name: Autumn Jewels Gelatin Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Use pecans, walnuts, or a mixture of both.
2. Chop the cranberries, apples, and celery into small pieces.
3. Drain the pineapple and save the juice.
4. Combine the cranberries, apples, and sugar; cover and refrigerate while preparing the rest of the salad.
5. Combine gelatin with boiling water and stir until dissolved.
6. Add enough water or fruit juice (apricot nectar, strawberry nectar, etc.) to the pineapple juice to equal 1 cup. Add this to the gelatin mixture.
7. Chill in the refrigerator until slightly thickened.
8. Combine the cranberry-apple mixture with celery, drained pineapple, and nuts.
9. Stir into the gelatin mixture.
10. Pour into a lightly greased mold or into individual serving molds.
11. Chill until firm.
12. Unmold and serve on a bed of lettuce or garnish with sour cream or slightly sweetened whipped cream and a very light sprinkling of cinnamon.
